rationale: The skill detects the project's framework by reading package manifests (package.json, requirements.txt, angular.json, etc.) via cat/ls/grep, then installs the Auth0 CLI via brew and runs `auth0 login`/`auth0 apps create` which authenticate against Auth0 hosted endpoints. Credentials returned by the CLI are typically written to a local environment file. The reference docs (references/cli.md, references/environments.md, references/concepts.md) are read from the skill bundle, and external Auth0 docs/community sites are linked for Tier 2 frameworks.
